content:
A summary of every Chaos Realm awakener. This is meant to be a description of what they generally do, how they play, what enlightens they require, and anything else a new player might want to know. This is the Second in a 4 part series that will provide the same overview for all realms.
https://youtu.be/XixAhCzWu6w

embeds.title: A Summary of Chaos: A Simple Guide to Every Yellow Awaker
embeds.description:
This is meant to be a new player guide to every (current) Chaos Awakener
Topics covered:
Enlightens, card effects, general play patterns, availability

content:
Just an informative and relaxing Dive walkthrough focusing on commentary teaching how to get the best out of Pollux's kit in Arc 1 - especially when borrowing a +12 one, hehe. I also very briefly touch on the new Covenants that are coming, but the details are left for the full guide in a week or two. Thanks if you check it out. <:M_satisfy:1400771690321154110> 
https://youtu.be/P5s7KXM9HqI

embeds.title: Pollux 101 - A Walkthrough Guide to Morimens Dives
embeds.description: A chill Arc 1 Morimens 72000 Dive walkthrough with a focus on showing and commentating everything a borrowed (AKA whale) Pollux can get done both offensively and defensively in the hardest content. I commentated all of my thoughts and decisions as I played through, so hopefully it can help teach you

content:
I found the stories of Castor and Pollux to be really intriguing, not to mention characters like Juliette. Here is a breakdown of their stories.
https://youtu.be/hqDzWnYY_LM?si=vqlbTWcfx985pW5g

embeds.title: Morimens: Understanding the Twin Divi
embeds.description:
Castor and Pollux are powerful Awakeners, but their story is a rough one. Born to the violent cult, the Church of the Lightbearers, these two were destined to be 'vessels', but a single book alters the course of their lives....

0:00 Castor's Story
14:41 Pollux's Story

My Invite Code: UMYL2OUIGS
